scripts.dev: npm run db:mysql && concurrently -c "cyan,magenta" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:pg: npm run db:postgres && concurrently -c "cyan,magenta" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:postgres: cd infra && docker-compose --profile postgres up postgres -d
